visual: Steps into a bow stance while one hand sweeps across the forward knee and the opposite hand pushes forward at shoulder height, alternating sides.
motion_description: The person begins balancing on the right leg with the left foot slightly raised, the right arm bent high, and the left arm resting across the chest. In a slow, steady flow, they step forward with the left foot and shift their weight into a front bow stance, rotating the torso to face squarely in the direction of the step. Concurrently, the left hand sweeps downward in a broad arc across the forward knee while the right hand pushes straight forward at shoulder height.
